历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 831 → 1228 → 1404 → 880 → 821. From 2021 to 2023, rankings showed a trend of moving backward year by year. In 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, rankings significantly recovered to 880, and further recovered to 821 in 2025. The rankings have been moving forward in the past two years, indicating a rebound in application popularity. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 821st place. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 71 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 73 in 2025. For 2026, the Physics Category plan is 58 students, and the Medical Category (first choice Physics, second choice Chemistry) has 11 students, totaling 69 students, a decrease of 4 students compared to 73 in 2025. This slight reduction in enrollment leads to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 14–18 range in recent years, belonging to the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (fabricated paper data, dean dismissed, etc.), but in 2025, there was only one reputation signal of abnormal admission cutoff. Douyin popularity ranks 26th overall (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an above-average level. In 2022, there was a significant negative reputation (the Henan cutoff gap incident), but it has been gradually digested in recent years. Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with 17 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, which are highly related to Tongji's engineering strengths, continue to be highly recommended. Although civil engineering and architecture are still in a state of differentiation and observation, they have warmed up compared to previous years. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is 110,868, a slight decrease from 2025 (History Category 31,071 + Physics Category 80,421 = 111,492), so competition pressure is basically flat. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong appeal to Jilin Province candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5% (2025), which is at a medium level for out-of-province universities. Shanghai's regional advantage as a first-tier city persists.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 821, the slight reduction in Physics Category enrollment for 2026 (73 to 69, a reduction of about 5.5%), the somewhat negative but gradually digested school reputation, and the sustained popularity of engineering advantage disciplines, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies, ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 810, with a range of 750–870.

- Engineering Pilot Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer and Electronics)

Tier 2 (Medium)

- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Smart Construction and Low-Carbon Environment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (750–870), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Pilot Classes (Intelligent Transportation, Science Pilot Class) as the main direction. Tier 1 Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class can be targeted as reach options, while Tier 3 Smart Construction and Low-Carbon Environment Class and Medical Pilot Class can serve as safety choices. Tongji's engineering strength is outstanding, and majors like Computer and Electronics, Intelligent Transportation have good employment prospects, making them worth considering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category/Liberal Arts was approximately 263 → 331 → 237 → 276 → 234, showing significant fluctuations overall, with better rankings (smaller numbers) in 2023 and 2025, and backward shifts in 2022 and 2024. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 234. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 4 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 6 students, an increase of 2 from 2025's 4, a 50% expansion, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves academic misconduct incidents in engineering and medical fields, with limited impact on liberal arts major applications; Douyin popularity ranks 26th overall (relatively popular); Foreign Language and Literature A-, Marxist Theory A-, liberal arts discipline evaluations are relatively weaker compared to engineering, but as a top 985 comprehensive university, Tongji's liberal arts platform advantages are significant.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese majors are socially recommended, Law is recommended for differentiation, Accounting/Finance/Auditing are recommended; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is 110,868, with the History Category proportion estimated based on recent years (about 28%), approximately 31,000 people, roughly flat compared to 2025's 31,071 History Category takers; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which also has strong regional appeal for liberal arts students; the enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 234, the significant expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (4 to 6, a 50% increase), and stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift significantly backward compared to 2025 (competition eases, ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 290, with a range of 260–320.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，2026年同济大学在吉林省医学类最低录取位次预计为1760名，较2025年的1884名有所回升（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），主要受招生计划首 次缩招影响。波动区间为1654至1866名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Tongji University enrolls medical students separately in Jilin Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 732, 458, 694, 965, and 1884 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, especially from 2024 to 2025, dropping sharply from 965 to 1884, a significant decline. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 5 students in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, with continuous expansion for five consecutive years, more than doubling the plan, which is the core reason for the continuous decline in rankings. The enrollment plan for 2026 is 11 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025, the first reduction in the past six years, with a reduction rate of about 8.3%, which will have a certain upward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university. The university has strong comprehensive strength, with coordinated development of engineering, medicine, science, and other disciplines. The medical discipline relies on Tongji University's century-old medical heritage, enjoys a high reputation both domestically and internationally, and has a sustained attraction for high-scoring candidates in Jilin Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examination applications. Programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) and Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class), which offer combined bachelor's and master's or bachelor's and doctoral programs, are particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with obvious regional advantages, and has a strong attraction for candidates from Northeast China. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Jilin Province is small (only 11 students in 2026), and the scarcity further increases the competition heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's medical category in Jilin Province in 2026 is expected to be 1760, an increase from 1884 in 2025 (the ranking number decreases, indicating intensified competition), mainly due to the first reduction in enrollment plan. The fluctuation range is 1654 to 1866. It is recommended that candidates plan their volunteer applications reasonably within this range.

- Medical Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) and Guohao Elite Class have the highest ranking requirements, requiring rankings near the upper limit of the predicted range; Medical Experimental Class (Clinical) and Medical Experimental Class (Life Sciences) are relatively safe choices.
